title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 376.391 - Co-payments for chiropractic services, cap
text:
376.391.  Co-payments for chiropractic services, cap. — A health benefit plan or health carrier, as defined in section 376.1350, including but not limited to preferred provider organizations, independent physicians associations, third-party administrators, or any entity that contracts with licensed health care providers shall not impose any co-payment that exceeds fifty percent of the total cost of providing any single chiropractic service to its enrollees.
(L. 2009 H.B. 577)
